name: Inflection Point Acquisition Corp. V
business: Inflection Point Acquisition Corp. V is a blank check company incorporated on May 31, 2024 in the Cayman Islands for the purpose of effecting a merger or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has neither engaged in any operations nor generated any revenue to date. On October 13, 2025, it entered into a Business Combination Agreement to acquire GOWell Technology Limited, which provides well logging technologies and distributed sensing solutions for energy companies globally.

exposures.sentence: GOWell Technology Limited is an international company that provides a wide range of innovative well logging technologies and distributed sensing solutions for energy companies globally.
GOWell Technology Limited is an international company that provides a wide range of innovative well logging technologies and distributed sensing solutions for energy companies globally.

catalysts.sentence: On January 7, 2026, we and the New Sponsor entered into an amendment to the Promissory Note, which increased the aggregate principal amount of the Promissory Note to $700,000 to reflect a $200,000 advance made by the New Sponsor to us for working capital (the Amendment to the Sponsor Loan).
We have until August 14, 2026 or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve, to consummate our initial business combination.
